title: Charred Creamy Indian Vermicelli Paratha
description: A charred, pillowy, lazy-sunday Indian dish featuring vermicelli pasta, wok-hei, and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients, formed into a paratha.
instructions: Heat ghee in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add curry leaves and cook until they are fragrant.
Add broken vermicelli pasta and cook for 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine whole wheat flour, salt, and cooked vermicelli pasta mixture.
Add yogurt and water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it is smooth.
Divide the dough into 4 equal parts and roll each part into a ball.
Roll each ball into a thin circle.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and cook each paratha for 2 minutes on each side.
